# Mythos Enigma : die Chiffriermaschine als Sammler- und Medienobjekt

Contributors: landwehr, dominik
Date: 2008-01-01
Subjects: cryptography in popular culture, enigma cipher system, world war, collectors and collecting, cryptography

Thesis (doctoral)--Universistät Basel, 2007 Includes bibliographical references (pages 229-247) and index. Description based on print version record; resource not viewed.
